subject: [PATCH v5 14/18] mm/pagemap: add PAGE_IS_ACCESSED for RWP tracking

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch adds a new category to the pagemap, called PAGE_IS_ACCESSED, which is used for tracking read-write protection (RWP) in userfaultfd. The existing PTE bit is reused for both write-protected and RWP-protected pages, but this patch introduces a distinction between the two by scoping each to the relevant VMA. This change also updates the pagemap_hugetlb_category function to take into account the VMA when determining which category to use. The patch aims to provide a more accurate representation of page state and improve the userfaultfd interface.
